relationships.name: chairs
relationships.description: Each department is led by exactly one instructor (the chair).

relationships.name: works in
relationships.description: An instructor belongs to one department; a department has many instructors.

relationships.name: offers
relationships.description: A course belongs to one department; a department offers many courses.

relationships.name: majors in
relationships.description: A student is majoring in one department.

relationships.name: advises
relationships.description: Each student has one academic advisor; an instructor may advise many students.

relationships.name: teaches (team)
relationships.description: A course can be taught by multiple instructors (team teaching).

relationships.name: has section
relationships.description: A course can have multiple sections in the same semester.

relationships.name: teaches
relationships.description: Each section is taught by exactly one instructor.

relationships.name: hosted in
relationships.description: Each section is held in one classroom; a classroom hosts many sections (not at the same time).

relationships.name: enrolls
relationships.description: A student enrolls in one section per course; each section has many students.

relationships.name: has
relationships.description: A section can have multiple exams.

relationships.name: takes
relationships.description: Each student can have at most one result per exam; each exam has many results.

constraints: Classroom capacity must not be exceeded.
An instructor cannot teach two sections at the same time.
Grades are only assigned after course completion.
A department's chair must be an instructor in that same department.
